signals.raw:
South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
This marks the latest confirmed data, up from 2.0% in January and February 2026 but below market forecasts of 2.4%, signaling contained price pressures amid global energy volatility from the Iran conflict.[1]
